name: generate_dsa_emu
short_description: Used to generate the emulation section for DSAs.
full_help:
generate_dsa_emu

Description: 
Used to generate the emulation section for DSAs.

Syntax: 
generate_dsa_emu  [-dsa <arg>] [-platform <arg>] [-prop-json-path <arg>]
                  [-output-dir-path <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name                Description
  -------------------------------
  [-dsa]              The target DSA
  [-platform]         The target PLATFORM
  [-prop-json-path]   emu properties json file
  [-output-dir-path]  Output path where to dump the emulation output
  [-quiet]            Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]          Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
Vitis, Platform, FileIO

arguments.description: The target PLATFORM [-prop-json-path]   emu properties json file [-output-dir-path]  Output path where to dump the emulation output
Suspend message limits during command execution
